name: source-of-truth
description: A self-maintaining Spec-Driven Development (SDD) catalog skill — read the docs/ catalog before touching code, sync it after a feature ships.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-catalog discipline: read before you code, sync after you ship
interface.longDescription: Source of Truth keeps a docs/ spec catalog as the project's source of truth for what exists, why it exists, and what rules apply. The skill reads the catalog before any code change and syncs it after a feature ships.
